rationale: Educ. Code §39.235 governs innovation grants for secondary school campuses. It contains no reference to homestead exemptions, property tax appraised value, or Tax Code §11.13(b), so the proposed change does not conflict with this rule.
quote: From funds appropriated for that purpose, the commissioner may establish a grant program under which grants are awarded to middle, junior high, and high school campuses and school districts to support:
_note: No textual or operational nexus between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this innovation grant statute.
